message:
fix: Wrap more labeled blocks in parentheses for function argument safety

Continuing the fix for labeled block expressions that can be confused
with named arguments when used in function calls:

- dict.get() on block expressions - wrap (dget_N: {...})
- list comprehensions - wrap (comp_N: {...})
- dict comprehensions - wrap (dict_N: {...})
- generator expressions - wrap (gen_N: {...})

This prevents parsing issues where "label:" is misinterpreted as a
named argument syntax in Zig function calls.
